input.background: A study takes an SRS from a population of full-term infants. The standard deviation of birth weights in this population is 2 pounds. Calculate 95% confidence intervals for μ for different sample sizes and sample means.
input.question: Calculate the 95% confidence interval for μ when n=36 and \bar{x}=7.0 pounds.

meta_info.caption: Newborn weight.
meta_info.section: 10.2 Confidence Intervals for $\mu$ When $\sigma$ Is Known
